# unifi_dns_policy (Resource)

A site DNS policy on the UniFi controller: a DNS record (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, SRV, TXT) or a per-domain forwarding policy (FORWARD_DOMAIN). The `type` selects which of the per-variant attributes apply.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# An A record mapping an internal hostname to an IPv4 address.
resource "unifi_dns_policy" "app_a_record" {
  type         = "A_RECORD"
  domain       = "app.example.com"
  ipv4_address = "192.0.2.10"
  ttl_seconds  = 3600
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) Policy type: A_RECORD, AAAA_RECORD, CNAME_RECORD, MX_RECORD, SRV_RECORD, TXT_RECORD, or FORWARD_DOMAIN.

### Optional

- `domain` (String) The domain (record name) the policy applies to. Used by every variant.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the policy is enabled.
- `ip_address` (String) IP address of the DNS server queries are forwarded to. FORWARD_DOMAIN only.
- `ipv4_address` (String) IPv4 address. A_RECORD only.
- `ipv6_address` (String) IPv6 address. AAAA_RECORD only.
- `mail_server_domain` (String) Mail server domain. MX_RECORD only.
- `port` (Number) Service port. SRV_RECORD only (0-65535).
- `priority` (Number) Priority; a lower number is preferred. MX_RECORD and SRV_RECORD (0-65535).
- `protocol` (String) Protocol used by the service. SRV_RECORD only.
- `server_domain` (String) Domain of the server running the service. SRV_RECORD only.
- `service` (String) Service associated with this record. SRV_RECORD only.
- `target_domain` (String) Canonical (target) domain. CNAME_RECORD only.
- `text` (String) Text value. TXT_RECORD only (up to 1024 chars).
- `ttl_seconds` (Number) Time to live in seconds. Used by A_RECORD/AAAA_RECORD (0-86400) and CNAME_RECORD (0-604800).
- `weight` (Number) Weight; a relative value for records of the same priority, lower is preferred. SRV_RECORD only (0-65535).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) DNS policy UUID.
